description_long: This is a thick, hardbound book with a rich brown leather cover, featuring ornate gold corner embellishments and a subtle geometric design on the spine. The cover has a textured, slightly pebbled appearance, giving it a classic and luxurious feel. The book's pages are visible from the sides, showing a yellowed, aged paper with a slight sheen, suggesting high-quality material. The spine is rounded and divided into three sections by subtle ridges, with the geometric motif adding a touch of mystique. The book appears to be well-crafted, with tight binding and no visible damage or wear. Its overall appearance suggests it could be a valuable or special edition, suitable for display or careful reading.
description: A thick, brown leather-bound book with gold corner decorations and a geometric design on the spine, featuring aged yellowed pages and a luxurious, classic appearance.
description_view_0: The front cover is fully visible, showcasing the brown leather texture, gold corner embellishments, and a geometric design on the spine.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the side, highlighting the thickness of the yellowed pages and the rounded spine with gold corner details.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, displaying the same brown leather and gold corner decorations, with the page block clearly seen along the bottom edge.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the book's thickness and the continuation of the gold corner designs, with the rounded spine visible on the right.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is brown leather with a subtle geometric gold design and three horizontal ridges dividing it into sections. No text is visible on the spine.
